title: Determine Author Display Location
description: Decide where and how the author information should be presented on the landing page according to UI/UX best practices and project conventions.
details: Review the current layout of the landing page (likely the main page at `/` wrapped by `layout.tsx`). Choose an appropriate location for the author attribution, such as the footer, header, or a dedicated section. Ensure the placement does not interfere with the chat playground's usability or aesthetics. Consider accessibility and responsiveness.
test_strategy: Verify the chosen location is visible on both desktop and mobile. Confirm it does not overlap or interfere with chat UI elements. Solicit feedback from a peer or designer if available.

title: Implement Author Information in Layout
description: Add the author’s name (and optionally, a link or brief bio) to the landing page in the chosen location, using semantic HTML and accessible markup.
details: Edit the relevant component (likely `layout.tsx` or the main landing page component) to include the author’s name. Use semantic tags (e.g., `<footer>`, `<address>`, or `<div>`) and ensure proper ARIA labeling if needed. Style minimally to match the existing design, using `globals.css` if necessary. If including a link (e.g., to a portfolio or GitHub), ensure it opens in a new tab and is accessible.
test_strategy: Check that the author information renders correctly, is accessible via screen reader, and is keyboard-navigable. Validate that links (if present) work as intended and meet accessibility standards.

title: Test Responsiveness and Accessibility
description: Ensure the author information displays correctly across devices and meets accessibility requirements.
details: Manually test the landing page on various screen sizes (desktop, tablet, mobile) to confirm the author info remains visible and well-positioned. Use browser accessibility tools (e.g., Lighthouse, axe) to check for ARIA compliance and keyboard navigation. Adjust styling or markup as needed to fix any issues.
test_strategy: Run manual and automated accessibility tests. Resize the browser window and use device emulation to check layout. Address any issues found.
